pageContext.name: Banshee
pageContext.description: In ancient lore, a banshee is a female spirit that wails outside a house as a warning that death will occur soon.   Sideshow Art Print and Ozone Productions present the Banshee Fine Art Print, a monstrously beautiful pinup by renowned artist Olivia De Berardinis.  This banshee's a total scream! Model Julie Strain embodies Olivia's ethereal emissary of death in this detailed illustration. Originally created in 1996 to promote Olivia's own Stiletto Heroes art exhibition and later seen gracing the cover of Heavy Metal Magazine, the silvery spirit is a sure sign of terror to those who hear her cries. Her blackened wings and sharpened attire show she's no angel, and a skeletal serpent tattoo adds an extra layer of deadliness to her appearance.  Each Banshee Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia and includes both her official embossed Seal of Authenticity and a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 175 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this badass beauty is a must-have for fans of pinup art, fierce femmes, and Olivia's dazzling creations.  If you hear her call, there's no fighting fate — bring home the Banshee Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis today!
